description: Your research group at the Scripps Institution of Oceanography is writing a paper on the 'Equatorial Cold Tongue and ITCZ Asymmetry'. Using NASA Panoply and the precipitation climatology data in ~/PanoplyData/, investigate the latitudinal position of the Intertropical Convergence Zone (ITCZ) over the Eastern Pacific Ocean in January and July. Following the analysis brief at ~/Desktop/itcz_asymmetry_brief.txt, export the required regional plots and the formal ITCZ asymmetry report to ~/Desktop/. As a tropical climatologist, rely on your observations of the data rather than generalized climate assumptions to complete the report accurately.
